curation_notes: Locations derived from the patch diff. The advisory names SkipBlockProof::verify as the primary target, but the patch fixes the same unchecked BitSet-to-u16 cast pattern in TendermintProof::verify and DoubleVoteProof::verify as well. All three verify methods in skip_block.rs, tendermint.rs, and equivocation_proof.rs are listed as vulnerable locations. multisig.rs is excluded because it only contains the newly added checked_signer_slots helper (the fix itself, not vulnerable pre-patch code). The pre-assigned class integer-overflow is correct: the root cause is usize-to-u16 truncation of signer slot indices. L3 hints were updated to be more specific than L1/L2 per updated guidelines.
